description: Horizontal tab bar at top (Personal, Security, Billing, Notifications). Each tab shows a card-based form. Clean, modern.

css_layout_rules..profile-header: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;
css_layout_rules..profile-tabs: display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 2rem;
css_layout_rules..tab-content: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; max-width: 640px;
